spouse.name: Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent

km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray於1252年出生。她於1285年之前與Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1295年享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray于1252年出生。她于1285年之前与Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1295年享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: McGreevy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Seamus, Brendan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Riabhaigh, a patronymic from the personal name Riabhach ‘brindled, grizzled’. Compare Reavey and Creevy 2.

variants.name: Grayer
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English grei ‘gray’ (see Gray ) + her ‘hair’.
Scottish (Ayrshire): variant of   Greer  .

variants.name: Grays
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Gray , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or of Grace .

variants.name: Grice
meanings: English (Midlands): from Middle English grice, grise ‘pig’ (Old Norse gríss), probably a nickname or a metonymic occupational name for a swineherd.
English: nickname for a gray-haired man, from Middle English grice, gris ‘gray’ (Old French gris, apparently of ancient Germanic origin, and probably a distant cognate of Gray 1).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Greis  .

variants.name: Grey
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
German: dialect variant of   Grau  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

en.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray was born in 1252. She married Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent before 1285, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1295, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray est née en 1252. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent avant 1285, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1295, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray wurde 1252 geboren. Sie hat vor 1285 in Europa Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1295 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray è nata il nel 1252. Lei sposato Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent prima del 1285, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1295, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice De Grayは1252年に生まれた。1285年以前にヨーロッパでSir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1295年に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray(은)는 1252년 태어났다. 그녀는 1285년 이전 우럽에서 Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray nasceu em 1252. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent antes 1285, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1295, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray родилась в 1252 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent перед 1285 г. в местности Европа. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1295 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Alice De Gray nació en 1252. Se casó con Sir Henry Apuldrefield of Broxham Manor, Westerham, Kent antes de 1285, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1295, a la edad de 43 años.
